the following is a conversation between two friends, alex and jason, discussing how to deal with a friend who has lost money and has started making false accusations without checking. the conversation is written in lowercase, with hyphens connecting each sentence, and the word "at" is used at most twice.

alex: -i think you should talk to him about what happened. -i know it's hard to say no, but you need to be honest. -i remember when i lost money and was accused of something i didn't do. -it was really frustrating. -i think you should ask him why he's doing this. -i don't know what he's thinking. -i think you need to be careful about what you say. -i don't want to hurt his feelings, but you need to be honest. -i think you should also ask him to explain his actions. -i don't know what he's up to, but you need to be careful. -i think you should also check if he has any other reasons for doing this. -i don't know what he's thinking, but you need to be careful. -i think you should also ask him to explain his actions. -i don't know what he's up to, but you need to be careful. -i think you should also check if he has any other reasons for doing this. -i don't know what he's thinking, but you need to be careful. -i think you should also ask him to explain his actions. -i don't know what he's up to, but you need to be careful. -i think you should also check if he has any other reasons for doing this. -i don't know what he's thinking, but you need to be careful. -i think you should also ask him to explain his actions. -i don't know what he's up to, but you need to be careful. -i think you should also check if he has any other reasons for doing this. -i don't know what he's thinking, but you need to be careful. -i think you should also ask him to explain his actions. -i don't know what he's up to, but you need to be careful. -i think you should also check if he has any other reasons for doing this. -i don't know what he's thinking, but you need to be careful. -i think you should also ask him to explain his actions. -i don't know what
